full_description: WaterReminder is a hydration app that sends reminders to drink water throughout the day. It helps users stay hydrated and develop healthy drinking habits. With WaterReminder, you can set customizable reminders to drink water at specific times of the day, track your water intake, and receive notifications to help you stay on track. The app also allows you to set daily water goals and monitor your progress over time. Whether you're an athlete, a busy professional, or simply looking to improve your overall health, WaterReminder is the perfect tool to help you stay hydrated and feel your best.
